protocol_notes: Following doctor-advised protocol to use SS-31 (Elamipretide, FDA-approved) after MOTS-c. Rationale: MOTS-c repairs mitochondrial wall first before SS-31 to avoid excessive reactive oxygen species from increased ATP production in unhealthy mitochondria. User notes their understanding may not be medically precise. States this protocol order may be more important for those with mitochondrial impairments like ME/CFS. Also clarifies their doctor is MD-licensed.
